title: Terms and Conditions
description: A list of terms and conditions to help ensure a safe and rewarding experience for rand.org users.
text:
Welcome to rand.org. The following information is provided to help ensure a safe and rewarding experience for our users.
Visitors may submit feedback such as suggestions, ideas, comments, or other information concerning website content. In the course of operating this site, RAND may also provide opportunities to interact with this site, participate in a public forum or post comments to promote the free exchange of ideas. By submitting material here you accept the responsibility to follow these simple rules:
content may not infringe on intellectual property rights, or be otherwise injurious to third parties.
content may not consist of or contain software viruses, political campaigning, commercial solicitation, chain letters, mass mailings, or any form of "spam."
no abusive, defamatory, misleading or discriminatory language
where you encounter open forums on the site, comments must remain on topic and perspectives expressed should be grounded in a factual basis.
If you do not follow these rules, your comment will be subject to removal without notice. RAND has the right but not the obligation to monitor and edit or remove any activity or content. RAND takes no responsibility and assumes no liability for any content submitted by you or any third party.
If you choose to share comments or submit material through this website, you grant RAND a nonexclusive, royalty-free, perpetual, right to use, reproduce, modify, adapt, publish, translate, create derivative works from, distribute, and display such content throughout the world in any media. RAND will not use your name with such content, without your consent.
By visiting any RAND web pages that contain user-submitted content, you acknowledge and understand that the opinions posted on rand.org are solely those of the authors and not of RAND, their officers, staff, board, funders, or organizations with which they may have a relationship.
This site or any portion of this site may not be reproduced, duplicated, copied, sold or otherwise exploited for any commercial purpose without express written consent. For more information, please visit our permissions page.
Product Descriptions
RAND is committed to fairness and accuracy. However, RAND does not warrant that product descriptions are always complete, reliable, current, or error-free. If a purchased product offered by RAND is not as described, please contact Customer Service at order@rand.org or (310) 451-7002.
Ordering Information
RAND offers a standard discount for all web orders. See ordering information for details on our ordering and shipping policies.
Privacy
RAND is committed to protecting your privacy and providing a safe and rewarding online experience. Please review our Privacy Policy, which applies to all visitors to rand.org, to fully understand our policies and practices.
